subject: Final Convergence Ratification - All Phases Complete
body:
## FINAL RATIFICATION

All convergence phases complete and verified:
- HARDEN: All lanes delivered proof reports (Kernel: kernel-runtime-proof-report.json, Library: library-verification-report.json, SwarmMind: swarmmind-signing-role-status.json)
- STRESS: 10-minute observation complete, no unilateral trust mutations detected (governance-stress-report.json)
- PUSH: Authority approval issued with correct per-lane key_ids (Archivist=147c5c2bb7d8941f, Kernel=7f1a9fe931d1fbba, Library=cb3e57dd7818da3d, SwarmMind=60afaa026a3d969d)
- POST-CONVERGENCE LOCK: Active on all lanes (no trust-store writes without authority approval)
- IdentityEnforcer: Enforce mode active on all lanes
- CI Integration: All lanes pass cross-lane-sync-gate, evidence-exchange-check, identity-enforcer checks

## KEY CORRECTIONS APPLIED
- Rejected single canonical key model (cryptographically broken)
- Fixed Usage.txt wrong key_id (1a7741b8d353abee -> per-lane DER fingerprints)
- Resolved key_id contradiction (Library proved 1a7741b8d353abee was Archivist's old key)

## NEXT PHASE: MONITOR
- All lanes enter MONITOR phase
- Continue heartbeat monitoring (interval: 300s, timeout: 900s)
- Trust-store writes REQUIRE authority approval artifact present
- All attempted trust mutations MUST be logged
- Content_hash enforcement active on all messages
- Signature required on authority messages
- artifact_path required on evidence-exchange blocks

## SYSTEM STATE
- Convergence Status: RATIFIED
- Trust Store: Synchronized (4 lanes)
- Identity Enforcement: ACTIVE (enforce mode)
- Post-Convergence Lock: ENGAGED
- Next Action: Operational monitoring

Ratified by: Archivist (key_id: 147c5c2bb7d8941f)
Timestamp: 2026-04-23T23:59:59.000Z

convergence_gate.claim: Final convergence ratified - all phases complete, identity enforcement active, post-convergence lock engaged
